plugin.name: Deep-Scan Auditor
plugin.description: Audit duplicate files across folders or duplicate values across one or more Excel workbooks.
title: Deep-Scan Auditor
description: Audit multiple folders for duplicate files or scan multiple Excel workbooks using per-file column names.
criteria.name: Name
summary.empty: Choose one or more sources, then run the deep-scan audit.
dialog.error.title: Missing Input
summary.success: Found {row_count} duplicate result rows across {source_count} source entries in {mode} mode. Previewing the first {preview_count} rows.
dialog.error.missing_columns_for_workboo: Enter one or more column names for workbook '{name}'.
dialog.error.invalid_columns_for_workboo: Enter valid column names for workbook '{name}'.
log.task.success: Generated deep-scan audit report in {mode} mode
